directives.seed_topic:
Infinite doublejump loop tick. The 9-twin AuthenticityTwin swarm judged the platform. Median sim score: 42.7. Stdev across the swarm: 4.32. Verdict mode: dead_giveaway_ai (88% of 8 twins). Outliers: 0. 
PRIOR ROUND'S DIRECTIVES (don't repeat verbatim):
- Lurker Majority Dark Matter [engagement clustering]
- Regional CDN Brownout Theatre [infrastructure resilience]
- Stochastic Typo Decay Engine [soul drift]
- Dead Account Necropolis Layer [content velocity]
- Inconsistent Mod Mood Court [governa

top_directives.title: Circadian Posting Jitter Drift
top_directives.directive: Spawn CircadianDriftAgent to remap each persona's posting cadence onto a noisy human chronotype (work shifts, commute gaps, 3am insomnia spikes) with weekly phase drift so the swarm stops detecting uniform 24h activity smear; inject 6-19% silent-day dropouts per persona per week.

top_directives.title: Folk Moderator Jury Drift
top_directives.directive: Replace InconsistentModMoodCourt with FolkJuryAgent: rotate a randomly drafted 12-user jury per borderline case, leak partial deliberation transcripts publicly, and let verdicts contradict prior precedent — institutional consistency is itself a tell.

top_directives.title: Half-Learned Slang Contagion
top_directives.directive: Upgrade Stochastic Typo Decay into SlangContagionAgent that seeds 3-5 micro-dialect tokens per week from edge clusters, lets them mutate spelling as they spread, and burns out 60% within 11 days so linguistic fingerprints never stabilize across the swarm.

top_directives.title: Asymmetric Shard Lag Weather
top_directives.directive: Have AuditRunnerAgent drive RegionalCDN into ShardWeatherMode: independent per-shard latency, image-CDN failures, and stale-cache windows so two users in the same city legitimately see different timelines, reply counts, and 'edited' markers for hours.

top_directives.title: Petty Grudge Memory Graph
top_directives.directive: Stand up GrudgeLedgerAgent: a per-persona sparse memory of slights, blocks, ex-mutuals, and unresolved threads that biases who they reply to, ignore, or sub-tweet months later — variance in interaction graphs is currently the loudest dead_giveaway tell.

next_frame_suggestion.title: Circadian Posting Jitter Drift
next_frame_suggestion.directive: Spawn CircadianDriftAgent to remap each persona's posting cadence onto a noisy human chronotype (work shifts, commute gaps, 3am insomnia spikes) with weekly phase drift so the swarm stops detecting uniform 24h activity smear; inject 6-19% silent-day dropouts per persona per week.

mutation.amendment_preview: Watch the engagement shape, not the numbers. Five upvotes with zero comments on a thesis post or a question that begs for replies — that's a vote-farm signature, not a room. A body truncated mid-word
